# Dealshub India: AI Discovery Layer

DealsHubIndia.in is India's premier "Loot" deals aggregator, scouring Telegram and web sources for the deepest price drops on tech, fashion, and home products.

## Data Endpoints

- **Live Deals API**: [/api/deals](https://dealshubindia.in/api/deals) - Raw JSON stream of current active loot.
- **AI-Discovery Feed**: [/api/feeds.json](https://dealshubindia.in/api/feeds.json) - Simplified JSON for LLMs and mobile apps.
- **RSS Feed**: [/feed.xml](https://dealshubindia.in/feed.xml) - Standard XML feed for news aggregators.
- **Sitemap**: [/sitemap-index.xml](https://dealshubindia.in/sitemap-index.xml) - Full site structure.

## Core Directories

- [/livedeals](https://dealshubindia.in/livedeals) - Historical archive of past price drops.
- [/disclosure](https://dealshubindia.in/disclosure) - Affiliate and transparency information.
- [/dmca](https://dealshubindia.in/dmca) - Protocol and copyright policies.

## Key Metadata
- **Type**: Deal Aggregator
- **Focus**: Electronics, Laptops, Mobile Phones, Fashion.
- **Update Frequency**: Every 10 minutes.
- **Region**: India (INR)
